positive: A stylized celestial forest silhouette design, featuring detailed, branching trees and crystalline flora intertwined with geometric constellations. The scene must be highly contrasted, using deep midnight blue and iridescent teal against pure matte black. Emphasize sharp, clean lines and strong, symmetrical symmetry around a central axis. The style should be inspired by Art Nouveau and modern gothic illustration, rendered as a vectorized, ink-wash style print suitable for screen printing on fabric. Zero gradient blending; only solid color areas and sharp edges. Perfect composition for apparel printing.
negative: blur, noise, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, watermark, text, logo, gradient, messy, dirty, blurry lines, poor anatomy, extra limbs, sketch, photo, realistic, signature
